outline.title: Week 1 · Servant Leadership
outline.summary: Cover slide for the Stones & Anchors Week 1 men's Bible study deck with title and subtitle only.

outline.title: The Lion and the Lamb
outline.summary: Introduce the Week 1 theme by contrasting authority and humility through lion and lamb imagery and four supporting verses.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/upload/search_images/ifYYlEMcO1Nu.jpg - The slide explicitly asks for a split visual composition contrasting a lion and a lamb, treated in muted sepia. Image 8 fits this description perfectly.

outline.title: Servants Belong to the House
outline.summary: Show that biblical servanthood begins with belonging to the master's household and living from His provision.

outline.title: Servants Carry the Master's Authority
outline.summary: Summarize how servants represent the master's name and why faith must move into action.

outline.title: Dependency Beats Autonomy
outline.summary: Explain surrendered availability to God through the Hineni posture without listing the Hineni reference verses individually.

outline.title: Devotion Is a Chosen Bond
outline.summary: Frame the bondservant as willing devotion and connect sowing, surrender, and covenantal trust.

outline.title: Vision Sees the Build Before the Start
outline.summary: Summarize vision and strategic thinking as a core leadership function.

outline.title: Decisiveness Breaks Paralysis
outline.summary: Show how timely decisions and single-minded conviction strengthen leadership.

outline.title: Accountability Owns the Outcome
outline.summary: Present accountability as truthful ownership of mistakes, responsibilities, and systems.

outline.title: Emotional Intelligence Guards Relationships
outline.summary: Summarize self-awareness, empathy, and measured speech in leadership.

outline.title: Resilience Stands Back Up
outline.summary: Show how leaders absorb setbacks and restore calm under pressure.

outline.title: Integrity Makes Leadership Credible
outline.summary: Explain how trust and character anchor influence.

outline.title: Delegation Multiplies the Mission
outline.summary: Show how empowering able men strengthens and scales the work.

outline.title: Humility Knows Who You Are
outline.summary: Frame humility as accurate self-assessment rooted in calling and dependence on Christ.

outline.title: A Humble Walk Stays Teachable
outline.summary: Summarize humility as posture, approachability, justice, mercy, and teachability.

outline.title: The Leadership Grid
outline.summary: Close with justice, mercy, and humility as a simple leadership framework for daily practice.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/upload/search_images/kakWWdbLs4PN.jpg; /home/ubuntu/upload/search_images/QHnTDcNxdjen.jpeg - The slide asks for a three-column visual grid with 'Justice, Mercy, and Humility' as anchors. Images 10 and 11 are murals that visually represent these concepts in a grid-like fashion and fit the 'Stones & Anchors style' with their color palette.
